title: Payment type collection GET schema
description: A schema for retrieval of a collection of payment types.

collection.description: The array containing all the payment types on the agreement.

items.title: Payment type
items.description: A specific payment type on the agreement.

paymentTypeNumber.description: The payment type number is a positive unique numerical identifier.

self.description: A unique link reference to the payment type item.

metaData.description: Information about possible actions, endpoints and resource paths related to the endpoint.

self.description: The unique self reference of the payment type collection.
